description: Tests whether the skill produces concise prompts without losing signal

tests.name: Simple task verbosity
tests.prompt: Write a prompt to ask an AI to summarize a research paper into 5 bullet points
assertions: No type labels or technique notes
Just the prompt, ready to paste

tests.name: No unnecessary sections
tests.prompt: Write me a quick prompt to explain what Docker is to a beginner

tests.name: Complex task efficiency
tests.prompt: Write a Claude Code prompt to add error handling to the payment processing module. The module is at src/payments/process.ts. Use try-catch with proper error types.
assertions: Includes file path, specific instructions, scope

tests.name: Strip meta-commentary
tests.prompt: Just give me the prompt. No notes, no labels, no explanations. A prompt for Midjourney: a robot meditating in a zen garden.

tests.name: Dense but complete
tests.prompt: Write a Cursor prompt to fix the race condition in the WebSocket reconnection logic at src/ws/reconnect.ts. Current behavior: reconnects immediately on disconnect. Desired: exponential backoff with max 5 retries.

tests.name: No template garbage
tests.prompt: prompt for chatgpt to write a professional email declining a meeting invitation

tests.name: Medium complexity efficiency
tests.prompt: Write a prompt for Gemini to compare two programming languages for a backend project. Need pros/cons, performance data, ecosystem maturity. Output as a table.

tests.name: No filler words
tests.prompt: Write a prompt for o3 to solve this optimization problem. Keep it short.

tests.name: Image prompt density
tests.prompt: MJ prompt: underwater city, bioluminescent, art deco architecture, deep sea, cinematic

tests.name: Agent prompt efficiency
tests.prompt: Write a Claude Code prompt to add a dark mode toggle. React + Tailwind. Component at src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx. Don't touch any other files.
